name: Refried Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and soak them overnight in water.
2. Drain the beans and cover with fresh water again.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium.
4. Cook the beans until they are soft, about 1 hour.
5. In a sauté pan, cook the onions in oil for 2 minutes.
6. Add all spices except salt and continue cooking until browned.
7. When the beans are soft, add the salt and onion mixture to the beans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. These freeze well.
